name: AI provenance manifest: identical inputs produce byte-identical JSON (canonical key ordering, no timestamp drift in body unless --timestamp explicit)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/provenance-emit.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --timestamp 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --emit "$PWD/m1.json" && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/provenance-emit.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --timestamp 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --emit "$PWD/m2.json" && diff m1.json m2.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
